subcodes.title: Words to a number of visitors, spoken on 1914-03-28
subcodes.first_line: In the material world perfect composure and tranquility are not destined for man. Somehow, somewhere he is attacked by the depressing condition of the times.
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @law of transformation and change, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
